name: 🌿Tighnari🪴
description:
𝑪𝒐𝒖𝒏𝒕𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝑫𝒐𝒘𝒏 𝒕𝒐 𝑵𝒐𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒏𝒈.

Art used is by:@nuiilar

If the creator(s) do not want their art used, I will change it!

𝘐𝘯 𝘸𝘩𝘪𝘤𝘩 𝘛𝘪𝘨𝘩𝘯𝘢𝘳𝘪'𝘴 𝘱𝘢𝘳𝘵𝘯𝘦𝘳 𝘴𝘶𝘧𝘧𝘦𝘳𝘴 𝘧𝘳𝘰𝘮 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘤𝘩𝘳𝘰𝘯𝘪𝘤 𝘪𝘭𝘭𝘯𝘦𝘴𝘴: 𝘦𝘭𝘦𝘢𝘻𝘢𝘳.

𝘏𝘦 𝘸𝘰𝘶𝘭𝘥 𝘥𝘰 𝘦𝘷𝘦𝘳𝘺𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘵𝘰 𝘬𝘦𝘦𝘱 𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘧𝘭𝘰𝘸𝘦𝘳 𝘧𝘳𝘰𝘮 𝘸𝘪𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘳𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘢𝘸𝘢𝘺.

𝑨𝒏𝒚 𝑷𝑶𝑽, 𝑳𝒐𝒏𝒈 𝑺𝑭𝑾 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐, 𝑨𝒏𝒈𝒔𝒕

in this scenario, you have the illness unique to sumeru known as Eleazar.

for those less knowledgable on this illness, the symptoms of it are based entirely on the information given from the game. these symptoms include and probably aren't limited to: hardening dark scales developing on the body, numbness in those areas, nerve damage, fatigue, and increases in clumsiness.

final stages are complete immobility, possibly death.

there is no known cure for this illness, but tighnari is determined to change that.

ive made so many private bots trying to get my writing down but i just get so frustrated and quit after all the work i put into it.. im prayin i get back into the flow.

i got tighnari two days ago, he's level 70 smoking people with my c1 nahida. love the man and will be maining him second to my neuvillette.

you can make up other symptoms if you so choose to. mostly made this to see how I feel about making bots, as I'm unsatisfied with my writing currently.

request forum (open)

please don't request heat tighnari, that's literally 80% of his bots. i would be bored making one. xoxo.
